_instructions: Copy this to .claude/settings.json and customize for your project. Shared permissions are included below — for project-specific trust (skills, MCP tools, etc.), create .claude/settings.local.json (not committed to git).

_env_config._note: Environment variables consumed by hooks and scripts. Values in the `env` block above are set by Claude Code for its own tool executions. Shell/cron invocations must read from the user's shell environment. NOTE: Claude Code does not expand `$HOME` in JSON values — path-valued vars like the analytics DBs are intentionally left undeclared; scripts fall back to `$HOME/.claude/*.db` when unset.
_env_config.CLAUDE_CODE_ADAPTIVE_THINKING: Claude Code adaptive thinking toggle (0=off, 1=on; default: 0)
_env_config.CLAUDE_TOOLKIT_LESSONS: Enable lessons ecosystem — surface-lessons, session-start nudges, /learn, /manage-lessons (0=off, 1=on; default: 0)
_env_config.CLAUDE_TOOLKIT_TRACEABILITY: Enable hook-logs JSONL writes + statusline usage-snapshot capture (0=off, 1=on; default: 0)
_env_config.CLAUDE_TOOLKIT_POWERLINE_VERSION: Pinned @owloops/claude-powerline npm version used by the statusline wrapper (default: 1.25.1)
_env_config.CLAUDE_ANALYTICS_LESSONS_DB: Path to global lessons SQLite DB (default: $HOME/.claude/lessons.db). Override in shell/.envrc — not settable from this file because Claude Code does not expand $HOME.
_env_config.CLAUDE_ANALYTICS_HOOKS_DIR: Directory for hook-logs JSONL files (default: $HOME/claude-analytics/hook-logs). Override in shell/.envrc — not settable from this file because Claude Code does not expand $HOME.
_env_config.CLAUDE_ANALYTICS_HOOKS_DB: Read-only path to hooks.db, used by surface-lessons.sh for intra-session dedup (default: $HOME/.claude/hooks.db). Owned and populated by the claude-sessions indexer.
_env_config.HOOK_PERF: Emit per-phase HOOK_PERF timing lines to stderr when set to 1 (default: unset)
_env_config.JSON_SIZE_THRESHOLD_KB: Size threshold in KB for JSON blocking (default: 50)
